title: AQ VF-7 Unwrapped Evidence Record
description: Draft 2020-12 schema for one record appended by scripts/governance/aq-evidence-collector.py. The record is deliberately shaped as a valid contracts.events.Envelope (contracts/events/envelope.py, extra="forbid") so it can share .agents/events/a2a-events.jsonl with aq-event's resume.update/pulse.append records without breaking existing readers. The `type` field and the payload's `kind` discriminator both identify this as a VF-7 evidence record, distinct from aq-event's own event types, so consumers can filter unambiguously.

event_id.description: uuid4 hex idempotency key for this record.

ts.description: Epoch seconds, matching the envelope convention (sortable, timezone-free).

subject.description: Optional scope/label for the captured evidence (e.g. a phase or slice name).

kind.description: Discriminator so existing a2a-events.jsonl consumers (aq-event resume/pulse projectors) can filter these records from their own event types.

digest.description: SHA-256 hex digest of (timestamp + payload_bytes + caller_agent_id), computed over the RAW pre-redaction bytes. The raw bytes themselves are never persisted.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp used as one of the three digest inputs.

stream.description: combined = subprocess stdout+stderr captured directly; stdin = raw bytes piped into the collector.

exit_code.description: Exit code of the captured command, when stream=combined.

byte_length.description: Length in bytes of the original raw evidence (pre-redaction).

redacted.description: True if redaction changed the decoded text (i.e. a secret pattern was found and stripped).

evidence_text.description: The captured evidence, UTF-8 decoded and redacted. Never truncated or line-stripped — this is the unwrapped guarantee minus only the redacted secret spans.
